name: @jeanibarz/knowledge-base-mcp-server
description: MCP server for retrieving data from different knowledge bases

scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test:coverage && npm run docs:check-anchors && npm run docs:check-config-reference && npm run docs:check-env-example && npm run config:check-env-usage && npm run docs:check-cli && npm run docs:check-mcp-tools && npm run docs:check-embedding-models && npm run docs:check-metrics-reference && npm run docs:check-error-codes && npm run docs:check-loaders
scripts.check:fast: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run docs:check-anchors && npm run docs:check-config-reference && npm run docs:check-env-example && npm run config:check-env-usage && npm run docs:check-cli && npm run docs:check-mcp-tools && npm run docs:check-embedding-models && npm run docs:check-metrics-reference && npm run docs:check-error-codes && npm run docs:check-loaders
scripts.bench: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/run.js
scripts.bench:beir: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/beir/run.js
scripts.bench:beir:sweep: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/beir/sweep.js
scripts.bench:beir:baseline: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/beir/baseline.js
scripts.bench:beir:matrix: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/beir/matrix.js
scripts.bench:beir:reranker-bakeoff: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/beir/reranker-bakeoff.js
scripts.bench:beir:leaderboard: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/compare/leaderboard.js
scripts.bench:beir:significance: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/significance.js
scripts.bench:beir:quality-gate: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/beir/quality-gate.js
scripts.bench:adjudicate: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/adjudication/adjudicate.js
scripts.bench:bright: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/bright/run.js
scripts.bench:rag-eval: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/rag-eval/run.js
scripts.bench:mteb: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/mteb/run.js
scripts.bench:compare: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/compare/run.js
scripts.bench:evol: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/evolution/run.js
scripts.bench:evol:iteration: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.bench.json && node build/benchmarks/evolution/iteration.js
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:parallel && npm run test:serial

author: jean.ibarz
